content: Came across this older email - apparently IIO gets a ton of new drivers, and it seems like Greg is open to the idea of Rust drivers there https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/2023061940-kindling-lagoon-3054@gregkh/. These are a lot of single-IC sensors that are probably pretty easy to understand
Not exactly sure how they get tested but it could be an interesting project for anyone looking
